page: Amazon Web Services r8i.48xlarge is a memory-optimized server instance powered by the AWS Nitro hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with an Intel Xeon 6975P-C processor, delivering 192 virtual CPUs across 96 physical cores with a clock speed of 3.9 GHz. The processor includes 480 MB of L3 cache and supports advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512 and Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions for vector and matrix operations.

The instance is equipped with 1536.0 GB of DDR5 memory operating at 7 GHz, providing 8.0 GB of RAM per physical core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 75 Gbps.

Benchmark results place the multi-core CPU performance and memory bandwidth in the top tier. The hardware demonstrates strong capabilities in database operations, with Redis SET operations reaching 268.31 million operations per second. It is highly suited for memory-intensive workloads, large-scale database deployments, and LLM prompt processing.
description: Amazon Web Services r8i.48xlarge is a memory-optimized server instance running on the AWS Nitro hypervisor. It features 192 vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 6975P-C processor running at 3.9 GHz, alongside 1536.0 GB of 7 GHz DDR5 memory. The instance does not include local storage or GPUs, but offers a 75 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Built on an x86_64 architecture, the CPU supports advanced instruction sets including AVX-512 and Intel AMX. Benchmark data indicates top-tier multi-core CPU performance, exceptional memory bandwidth, and high-throughput database operations, with Redis SET performance exceeding 268 million operations per second. This profile makes the r8i.48xlarge highly effective for large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise applications, and high-throughput data processing workloads.
og_description: Amazon Web Services r8i.48xlarge is a memory-optimized server featuring 192 vCPUs, 1536 GB of DDR5 RAM, and a 3.9 GHz Intel Xeon processor, delivering top-tier multi-core and database performance.
meta_description: Amazon Web Services r8i.48xlarge is a memory-optimized instance with 192 vCPUs, 1.5 TB of DDR5 RAM, and 75 Gbps network bandwidth.
tagline: A high-capacity memory-optimized instance featuring next-generation DDR5 RAM and advanced matrix extensions for demanding enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 192 vCPUs and 1536.0 GB of high-speed 7 GHz DDR5 memory
Intel Xeon 6975P-C processor with AVX-512 and AMX support
Top-tier multi-core CPU and memory bandwidth benchmark results
75 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with Nitro hypervisor integration
Optimized for in-memory databases, Redis, and large-scale data processing
